{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Consuming
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Consuming]] power is a fast way for [[Lindon]] to advance.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
